creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I suspect this is specifically related to libmediainfo but reverting

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/multimedia/mediainfo/Makefile?id=23e0e7b1c30fc6f86957a7428e51a5ea9c594291
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/multimedia/libmediainfo?id=93d0a119a698aa76d582123be9d97c4fedadc6bd
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/multimedia/libzen?id=23e0c77bf218f44eb3593950367258bc60d040e6

fixes the issue reporterd with sonarr here by maintainer:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=268709#c2

Is there any reason for this change?
